creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
This is a rewrite of the www/aolserver port, including an update to 4.5
I would like to take over maintainership, if the maintainer agrees.

All modules are now treated as separate ports.

Please see http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports for all ports in text and
.tar.gz format (including suggested module ports for the beginning).

This port requires TCL to be threaded ... there is still no direct support
for this, please see my PR ports/103897

If this PR should be commited, then: USE_TCL=84-threads
